# Convolution

**Summary**: A mathematical operation where a kernel is moved across data to calculate weighted averages of neighboring pixels.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-adetokunbo|Adetokunbo, 2015]] applied convolution to implement both 3x3x3 and 5x5x5 magic cube kernels.

## Key Results and Findings

- Convolution is used in several image processing algorithms to simplify large amounts of data volume by exploring spatial characteristics of neighboring traces. ([[2015-adetokunbo|Adetokunbo, 2015, p. 28]])
